memoryArtifacts.headline: Arley Hall Cheshire UK history
memoryArtifacts.description: Arley Hall is a country house in the village of Arley, Cheshire, England, about 4 miles (6 km) south of Lymm and 5 miles (8 km) north of Northwich. It is home to the owner, Viscount Ashbrook and his f …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Original Arley Hall History
memoryArtifacts.description: The Arley estate has been part of the land held by the Warburton family since the end of the 12th century.[1] In 1469 Piers Warburton moved his principal seat from Warburton to Arley, and built the fi …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche Warburton於1496年出生在英國爾阿爾 霍爾時，她的父親Sir John Warburton37歲，母親Lady Jane Stanley Warburton33歲。她於1504年與William Davenport II在英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1542年之後在英國爾布拉哈爾。

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche Warburton was born in 1496, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir John Warburton, was 37 and her mother, Lady Jane Stanley Warburton, was 33. She married William Davenport II in 1504, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 1542, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche Warburton est née en 1496, à Arley Hall, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Warburton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Stanley Warburton, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Davenport II en 1504, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 1542, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche Warburton(이)가 1496년 영국 체실르 알리 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Warburton(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Jane Stanley Warburton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브램홀에서 William Davenport II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1542년 이후 영국 체실르 브램홀에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche Warburton родилась в 1496 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Warburton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Stanley Warburton, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Davenport II в 1504 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 1542 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия.
